title: Azur
description:
Experience smooth, lag-free survival adventures with Sodium and Lithium, keeping your FPS high whether you’re mining, building, or exploring. 

MouseTweaks makes inventory management effortless, while Fullbright lets you see every detail of your world.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91fe94cdfa701c68516fef6d4ab89730023ac460.png)A compact and performance-friendly modpack designed for players who love the core Minecraft survival experience but crave a smoother, more enjoyable journey. Featuring a carefully curated selection of Quality of Life (QoL) and performance-enhancing mods, this pack ensures improved gameplay without straying too far from vanilla mechanics.

This modpack is especially well-suited for SMP (Survival Multiplayer) servers, offering a balanced experience for collaborative or competitive play with friends.

Dig out whole ore veins with just a swing of your Pickaxe with "Diggus Maximus". Have a look at what's around you and create Waypoints with "Xaero's MiniMap and WorldMap". Your game will run smoother by the Help of "Sodium" and "Lithium". On top of all that you will have access to the most beatiful shaders, because "Iris" will make your world look stunning!

Explore, build, and survive in a world optimized for fun and efficiency! Perfect for casual players, Minecraft veterans, and SMP communities alike.

Have fun! :D
